description: Secondary use: Note to Abū l-Faḍl b. Elʿazar. In Judaeo-Arabic. "You are neither a scholar nor a relative nor a friend of mine because of what you did!" Specifically, the sender is upset that the addressee did not come to see him off before he traveled, and he now invites him again in belligerent terms. (Information from Mediterranean Society, V, 34, where there is a full translation.)
description_he: פתק לאבו אל-פדל ב' אלעזר. ביהודית-ערבית. הכותב כועס שהנמען לא בא לשלח אותו לפני נסיעתו, ומזמין אותו שוב בטון לוחמני.
